approval_statement: I explicitly approve MBTI-CROSS-APPROVAL-48 operator editorial approval for exact package SHA 604851b56031d22d48036e87a5358bf85c9e13268655dbe36d2ab798b3f58dae covering only enfp-vs-entp, estj-vs-entj, and isfp-vs-infp. This approval permits finalizing and merging PR #1801 and proceeding to MBTI-CROSS-PUBLISHER-49; it does not authorize production CMS/DB writes, publication/indexability changes, sitemap/llms changes, or search submission.
